prs.title: Align schemas, playbooks, assessment refactor, and code quality hardening
prs.author: Jason
prs.rationale: 128 files changed with 7783 custom lines spanning schema refactors, AI agent updates, playbook introduction, assessment page overhaul, and broad code quality hardening across the full platform stack — this is a transformative, multi-week integration effort.

prs.title: Ch/refactor/misc
prs.author: Chris
prs.rationale: 57 files and 3489 custom lines introducing playbooks, assessment page refactor, new Prisma schema models with migrations, seed scripts, and supporting docs represent a major feature-level effort that forms the foundational spine later merged into PR #291.

stories.name: Platform Stability and Code Quality Overhaul
stories.rationale: Combined schema alignment, playbook and assessment refactoring, and miscellaneous code quality improvements to strengthen the overall reliability and maintainability of the core platform.
